summary: Collections management application with customer details, contact management, and account type tracking
architectural_notes: Customer detail section includes mobile field with contact selector
Contact system supports primary and secondary contacts per account
Product types: Loan, Credit Card, Overdrawn

existing_features.title: Add an icon button next to the mobile field in the customer detail section that opens a dropdown/popover displaying the primary and secondary contact phone numbers for the account
Implement click functionality on the contact options in the dropdown so that selecting a contact populates the mobile field with the chosen phone number
Set the primary contact as the default value for the mobile field when the case detail page loads
Add a 'Product Type' field label and value display to the horizontal area containing 'Days Past Due', positioned below the existing Days Past Due field
Display the product type value which can be 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn' below the Product Type label

new_feature_requests.summary: Add contact selector icon next to mobile field with primary/secondary contacts
Add Product Type field (Loan/Credit Card/Overdrawn) to Days Past Due area
Update the Case type in backend/main.mo to include primaryContact, secondaryContact, and productType fields to support the new UI features

projectName: Add contact selector to mobile field and Product Type field to account info
